Dave Matthews & Tim Reynolds
DTE Energy Music Theatre     Clarkston, MI

Tuesday
Total Song Time
2 hours and 27 minutes and 51 seconds
Avg Song Debut 09.19.2000
Song Rarity Rank: 11 of 17
Setlist Changes
- Tim Improv picked instead of Betrayal
- Grey Street and Dancing Nancies swapped
- Crash Into Me cut after The Space Between
- Fool to Think cut after Dancing Nancies
- Don't Drink the Water and Rooftop cut after Grey Street
